papers.summary: This book addresses the metaphysical question of the first principles as articulated by Damascius (458/462-538) in his Problems and Solutions Concerning the First Principles (De Principiis). Damascius’ treatise is a major philosophical work of Antiquity, offering a radical and profound enquiry into principles. The present book stresses the philosophical and historical relevance of Damascius’ work with regard to this metaphysical issue and provides a detailed analysis of the De Principiis. This study is based on the hypothesis that the aporetic opening of Damascius’ treatise and his treatment of the concept of an absolute and completely ineffable principle are the first step toward an enquiry about the first principles which can be called “principles,” namely the One and its threefold manifestation as One-All, All-One, and One-Being. papers.summary_ja: 後期新プラトン主義の哲学者ダマスキウス（458/462-538年）による『諸第一原理に関する問題と解決』を扱い、第一原理の形而上学的問題を根本的に考察する古代の重要な哲学的著作である。
papers.novelty_reason: 古代テキストの詳細な解釈研究であり、既存の新プラトン主義研究の延長線上にある。

The introductory section has been reorganized to articulate the causal chain linking fossil-fuel industrialization, the doctrine of perpetual economic growth, and the resulting destabilization of planetary systems. A new opening section reconstructs the historical escape from classical Malthusian limits through fossil energy, analyzes the expansion of global population and consumption under industrial civilization, and explains how these processes produced a condition of planetary-scale ecological overshoot. papers.summary: This thesis offers a comparative-ethical analysis of textual tensions in the teachings of Jesus and Muhammad about filial relations as well as their reception in contemporary Christian-Muslim relations. While the issue of textual tension has been widely used, and abused, in the context of religious polemics, it is virtually ignored in the practice of interreligious dialogue. One reason for the absence of effective Christian-Muslim dialogue on textual tension is the absence of a clear hermeneutical approach that facilitates and promotes mutual understanding between the two religious traditions. The problem of textual tension can be addressed if the strengths of, and opportunities presented by, interreligious dialogue and comparative ethics are brought together. Interreligious dialogue, on the one hand, has the clear purpose of promoting mutual understanding but it lacks a clear approach to the practice of dialogue. The academic study of comparative ethics, on the other hand, offers well...

papers.title: Labour mobility in Europe: Using Planned Behaviour Theory to understand migration intentions and location choice of the highly skilled

papers.summary: Highly skilled migration is a complex phenomenon which despite its comparatively small volume continues to receive interest from a variety of disciplines, all seeking to understand what drives individuals to migrate, and where to. Migration in general has historically been assessed through an economic lens, assuming financial incentives as the key motivation, and treating the migrant as a rational actor who carefully considers their options before making a rational decision about location and time of migration. This approach, however, proves unsatisfactory because it fails to consider non-financial drivers, the individual’s social environment, and the presence of perceived challenges which all influence the decision-making process. This study applies an expanded Planned Behaviour Theory model to understand how highly skilled young Europeans form their intention to migrate, which locations they choose, and what factors influence their decision-making process before migration takes place...

papers.novelty_reason: 心理学的理論を移動研究に適用する新しい視点だが、理論的枠組みは既知である。

papers.title: Predictions at war: an inferential approach to decision-making in international politics
papers.title_ja: 戦争時の予測：国際政治における意思決定への推論的アプローチ
papers.summary: This thesis introduces the inferential actor model to International Relations to address the persistent puzzle of why leaders make sub-optimal foreign policy choices. Drawing on the neuroscience theory of active inference, it reframes decision-making as a dynamic process in which uncertainty is not simply a problem of missing information but an actor-managed variable with direct implications for the decision process. The model’s validity is tested through an extended case study of Lyndon Johnson’s Vietnam strategy (1964-65), comparing its expectations with those of two stylized alternatives: a realist model rooted in rationalist assumptions and a domestic politics model. Based on extensive archival research, the thesis finds that gradual escalation was less the product of firm conviction than a costly exercise in hypothesis testing. papers.summary_ja: 本論文は推論的行為主体モデルを国際関係論に導入し、指導者の最適でない外交政策決定の謎に対処する。神経科学の能動的推論理論を応用し、不確実性を管理する動的プロセスとして意思決定を再構成している。

papers.summary: Between Art and Empire examines the British Empire’s role in shaping the establishment, collection and display practices of the National Gallery from 1824 to 1874. Established at a time when Britain had been positioning itself as a global economic and political power through imperial dominance, the Gallery’s foundation relied on donations, bequests, purchases and time invested in trusteeships from individuals who were actively profiting from imperial businesses. The thesis takes a broad view of the Empire by considering imperial trade, commerce and slavery in both the British East and West Indies. This thesis examines the ways in which imperial wealth underpinned cultural patronage, and how cultural institutions reflected imperialism. Between Art and Empire adopts an expansive approach to institutional history by examining both the history of the Gallery’s collection and the mechanisms of power that underlie its administration. It deploys large-scale quantitative data analysis and inti...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、1824年から1874年の間にナショナルギャラリーの設立、収集、展示実践を形成したイギリス帝国の役割を検証し、帝国と美術機関の相互関係を明らかにしている。

papers.summary: This research investigates the 20th-century restoration process of two significant historical buildings: the Abbasid Palace and the Mustansiriya Madrasa in Baghdad, Iraq. Both buildings are examples of the late Abbasid architecture, dating back to the 12th and 13th centuries, and were extensively reconstructed during the 20th century to restore their former grandeur. The aim of this study is to explore how the restoration of these sites reflects Iraq’s approach to heritage preservation. Existing literature suggests a relationship between the two sites, and this research aims to test this proposition. To document and analyse these two historic Iraqi buildings, a combination of historical and digital methods is used. Historical research includes archival materials and secondary literature on medieval Baghdad and 20th-century heritage practices. Digital technologies, including laser scanning, photogrammetry, and three-dimensional modelling, with their ability to document, interpret, analy...
papers.summary_ja: 本研究は、バグダッドの2つの重要な歴史的建築物（アッバース朝宮殿とムスタンシリヤ・マドラサ）の20世紀における修復過程を調査する。12-13世紀のアッバース朝後期建築の例であり、大規模な改修を受けた。

papers.summary: This article examines the historical trajectory of the Social and Solidarity Economy (SSE) in South Korea, where it has experienced spectacular development over the past fifteen years, analyzing it through the lens of its relationship with public authorities. The longitudinal analysis conducted for the period 1910-2020 is based on a mixed methodology that combines often incomplete and heterogeneous descriptive statistics, documentary analysis, examination of institutional documents, thematic interviews, and case studies. It also mobilizes the theoretical framework of social origins theory established by Salamon and Anheier (1998) and the typology of relationships between the nonprofit sector and public authorities proposed by Young (2000) to demonstrate that the typical relationship between SSE and public authorities follows fluctuating models specific to each historical period and tends toward a complementary relationship marked by reciprocal influences and growing SSE autonomy. papers.summary: Soviet cinema has always been a central tool for propaganda and the construction of socialism, as Vladimir Lenin emphasized when he called it ''the most important of the arts.'' In the decades following the October Revolution of 1917, this cinema glorified the ideals of the Communist Party, fulfilling the demands of socialist realism and serving the goals of the state. The Stalinist years reinforced this role, imposing strict censorship and artistic homogenization. However, Stalin's death in 1953 marked the beginning of a cultural transformation, notably driven by the Khrushchevite Thaw. This thesis explores the dynamics of Soviet cinema between Stalin's death and perestroika, highlighting the interaction between Soviet cinema and international influences. The Thaw allowed for greater thematic and stylistic freedom, fostering an artistic dialogue with the West. The influence of the French New Wave is particularly notable, with Soviet directors drawing inspiration from its innovative te...
papers.summary_ja: レーニンが「最も重要な芸術」と称したソビエト映画について、スターリン死後からペレストロイカまでの時期における文化転移を分析し、国際的な映画交流の動態を検討する。
papers.novelty_reason: ソビエト映画の時期区分と国際的文脈化は新しい視点だが、既存の映画史学の方法論の応用である。

papers.summary: This thesis investigates the underexplored role of music within early Coptic literature to address a significant gap in early Christian musicology. While substantial research has been conducted on Greek, Latin, and Syriac language sources (McKinnon, 1987; Page 2010), Coptic-language texts have been largely neglected despite their potential to offer unique insights into the cultural and religious dynamics of late antique Egypt. The study seeks to challenge this oversight by systematically analysing musical references across a diverse corpus of early Coptic texts. Scholarship has to-date primarily focused on the hymnic traditions of the Coptic Church and the Greek-language writings of early Church Fathers (Mikhail, 2014; Samaan, 2008; Moftah et al., 1991). However, broader literary and non-musical texts remain overlooked, resulting in a narrow understanding of early Coptic music as homogeneous and predominantly ecclesiastical. papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、初期キリスト教音楽学における重大なギャップを埋めるため、初期コプト文学における音楽の過度に未検討の役割を調査する。ギリシア語、ラテン語、シリア語資料は十分な研究があるが、コプト言語テキストは忘れられていた。

papers.title: The seminal proteome of a monandrous fly, Drosophila subobscura
papers.title_ja: 単婚性ハエDrosophila subobscuraの精液プロテオーム
papers.summary: When females mate with multiple males, ejaculates from different partners compete within the female reproductive tract. Males gain a competitive advantage by transferring seminal fluid proteins (Sfps) that manipulate female post-mating responses, such as reducing female propensity to remate. But in monandrous species, where females typically mate only once, post-mating sexual selection is absent, raising key questions about the complexity and identity of Sfps in monandrous seminal proteomes. To address this, we characterised the seminal proteome of the monandrous fly Drosophila subobscura. Using long-read RNA-seq, we created improved gene models for the D. subobscura accessory gland and ejaculatory duct, then, using a label-free quantitative proteomics approach, we identified 172 Sfps. This number is comparable to the 153 Sfps previously reported in polyandrous D. melanogaster using a similar approach. The D. subobscura seminal proteome contains all the D. melanogaster sex peptide netw...
papers.summary_ja: 複数オスと交配するメスの生殖管内で精液が競争する際、オスは精液流動性タンパク質(Sfps)を転送してメスの交配後応答を操作し、再交配傾向を低減させることで競争優位を得る。本研究は単婚性ハエにおけるこのメカニズムの特性を明らかにする。

papers.title: A Human Pan-Disease Whole Blood Transcriptomics Atlas Reveals Systemic Signatures Across Diseases
papers.title_ja: 全血トランスクリプトミクスによるヒト汎疾患アトラスが複数疾患における全身的シグネチャーを明らかにする
papers.summary: This dataset accompanies the manuscript titled “A Human Pan-Disease Whole Blood Transcriptomics Atlas Reveals Systemic Signatures Across Diseases” Whole-blood transcriptomics (WBT) provides critical insights into systemic health and disease. In this study, we established a large-scale WBT Atlas comprising 4,444 samples across 98 distinct health conditions. Through integrative analyses, we identified disease-specific gene expression signatures and developed a multi-omics classification framework capable of distinguishing among these conditions based on their unique transcriptomic profiles. papers.authors: Federico Musciotto, Begoña Dobón, Michael Greenacre, Álex Mira, Nikhil Chaudhary, Guz Deniz Salali, Pascale Gerbault, Rodoplh Schlaepfer, Leonora H. Astete, Marilyn Ngales
papers.summary: Here we investigate the effects of extensive sociality and mobility on the oral microbiome of 138 Agta hunter-gatherers from the Philippines. Our comparisons of microbiome composition showed that the Agta are more similar to Central African Bayaka hunter-gatherers than to neighbouring farmers. We also defined the Agta social microbiome as a set of 137 oral bacteria (only 7% of 1980 amplicon sequence variants) significantly influenced by social contact (quantified through wireless sensors of short-range interactions). We show that large interaction networks including strong links between close kin, spouses, and even unrelated friends, can significantly predict bacterial transmission networks across Agta camps. Finally, we show that more central individuals to social networks are also bacterial supersharers. We conclude that hunter-gatherer social microbiomes are predominantly pathogenic and were shaped by evolutionary tradeoffs between extensive sociality and disease spread.

papers.summary: This project tests a model of cooperation in which breaking an explicit cooperative promise (“defection”) carries a cognitive cost, and individuals anticipate and manage that cost when deciding how to act. Participants complete an online experiment (implemented in Gorilla and run on Prolific) that combines memory tasks with a one-shot trust game. The key manipulation is the size of a bonus for a second memory test offered later in the study ($1 vs $20). The central prediction is that a larger downstream bonus will reduce the rate of promise-breaking in the trust game. We will test our primary hypothesis with a preregistered logistic regression predicting Defection from Condition (low vs high bonus), supplemented by a two-proportion test and pre-specified robustness analyses that re-code Defection among promisors only and, descriptively, separate non-promisers from promise-keepers and defectors.
papers.summary_ja: 協力的約束の破棄（背信行為）が認知的コストをもたらし、個人がこのコストを事前に予想して行動決定を行うメカニズムをテストした実験研究。オンライン実験プラットフォームを用いて人間の協力行動の認知モデルを検証している。
papers.novelty_reason: 協力ゲーム理論は既知だが、認知的負債という心理メカニズムを明示的に組み込んだ新しい理論的枠組みを提示している。

papers.title: Experimental Data on Affective Induction and Decision-Making Performance by Social Media Use: IGT and PANAS Assessments
papers.title_ja: ソーシャルメディア利用による感情誘導と意思決定パフォーマンス：IGTおよびPANAS評価を用いた実験データ
papers.summary: [Experimental Data on Affective Induction and Decision-Making Performance by Social Media Use: IGT and PANAS Assessments]
papers.summary_ja: ソーシャルメディア使用が感情状態と意思決定能力に及ぼす影響を、アイオワギャンブルタスク（IGT）と感情スケール（PANAS）で測定した実験研究。デジタル技術と認知機能の関係性を実証データで示している。
papers.novelty_reason: ソーシャルメディアの心理的影響は研究されているが、標準化された認知タスクと感情測定を組み合わせた体系的検証は相対的に新しい。

papers.title: Short Video-based Nature Exposures and Cognition: The Impacts of Nature on Memory
papers.title_ja: 短編動画による自然への露出と認知機能：自然が記憶に与える影響
papers.summary: Exposure to natural environments has been shown to produce robust effects on attention-related functions (Berman et al., 2008; Stenfors et al., 2019; Stevenson et al., 2018; Bratman et al., 2015; Stevenson et al., 2018). Attention restoration theory (ART) proposes that stimuli in compatible environments engage individuals in involuntary attention, allowing more effortful top-down processes to replenish (Kaplan, 1995; Pham & Sanocki, 2024). However, ART research does not account for differences in compatibility, nor does it investigate other domains of cognition that may indirectly benefit from attention restoration, such as long-term memory. To address these gaps, we investigated how environmental exposure (either nature or urban) would affect mnemonic discrimination, and if environmental preference played a role in such effects. In the current study, 58 young adults completed environmental preference measures, watched 10-minute environmental exposure videos (nature or urban), then...
papers.summary_ja: 自然環境への露出が注意機能に与える影響は知られているが、本研究は短編動画形式での自然露出が記憶機能に与える影響を検証した。注意回復理論（ART）を拡張して、デジタルメディア環境での自然の効果を測定している。
papers.novelty_reason: 注意回復理論は確立されているが、短編動画というデジタルフォーマットでの自然露出効果は新しい応用研究領域である。

papers.title: Behavioral science to strengthen democracy
papers.title_ja: 民主主義を強化する行動科学
papers.summary: Democracy faces critical challenges, including declining trust, misinformation, political polarization, and the strain on election systems. Despite its importance, behavioral science has contributed relatively little to addressing these issues compared to fields like health and sustainability. This thesis seeks to fill that gap by exploring how behavioral science can strengthen democracy through practical, evidence-based interventions. Chapter one reviews the evidence and opportunities. Chapter two demonstrates how operational transparency, using video, print, and email interventions, increases voter trust and turnout, especially among those who have no party preference. Chapter three examines the role of trusted messengers and inoculation techniques, such as prebunking and accuracy nudges, in combating misinformation. Findings reveal that local, trusted figures, like election officials and pastors, effectively improve voter trust and truth discernment, particularly during active elect...
papers.summary_ja: 民主主義が信頼低下、偽情報、政治分極化といった危機に直面する中で、行動科学がこれらの課題対応にいかに貢献できるかを論じた研究。健康やサステナビリティ分野での行動科学の成功を民主主義領域へ応用する可能性を探索している。
papers.novelty_reason: 行動科学を民主主義制度強化という公共政策課題に直接適用する文脈は新しく、学問領域の横断的応用を示唆している。

papers.title: Teacher agency in neoliberal authoritarian contexts : negotiation, constraints, and possibilities

papers.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.
papers.summary_ja: 新自由主義的改革と権威主義的統治が並存する文脈で、教師がどの程度の行為主体性を保有し、いかに制度的制約の中で職業的自律性を交渉するかを検証した論文。教育政策と教師実践の相互作用を分析している。
papers.novelty_reason: 新自由主義と権威主義が並行する政治経済体制を対象にした教師行為主体性研究は、既存の自由民主主義モデルを超える新しい分析枠組みを提供している。

papers.novelty_reason: 中国農村部の女性政治参加は研究されているが、社会的役割と資本の概念を統合した分析枠組みは相対的に新しい視点である。

papers.novelty_reason: 医療機関のサステナビリティ経営は新興分野だが、既存の企業サステナビリティ研究の医療セクターへの適用であり、革新的ではない。

papers.title: The Impact of Digital Technologies: Exploring the Role of Social Media for New Product Development and Firm Performance
papers.title_ja: デジタル技術の影響：新製品開発および企業パフォーマンスにおけるソーシャルメディアの役割の探索

papers.novelty_reason: ソーシャルメディアとイノベーションの関係は既知だが、実証的な因果メカニズムの検証という既存枠組み内での研究である。

papers.title: The nature and tensions of environmental management control in local authorities
papers.title_ja: 地方自治体における環境管理制御の性質と緊張関係
papers.authors: Christophe Maurel, Christophe Favoreu, London Proofreaders
papers.summary: This exploratory research aims to characterize, on the one hand, the concept of environmental management control (EMC) through the practices that underpin it, and, on the other hand, the tensions associated with it and the implementation of these practices in public organizations. Although EMC is attracting growing interest within the public sector, it seems to be facing technical and governance difficulties. A grid for analyzing management tools and the theory of organizational paradoxes is used to address the issue of characterizing EMC practices and the associated tensions in the local public sector. Various municipalities were mobilized to explore and characterize their first experiences of implementing EMC. Our results enable us to characterize both the tools used and the tensions generated between the objectives pursued in terms of resource management, dialogue with the socio-economic environment, and behavioral orientation.
papers.summary_ja: 公共組織における環境管理制御（EMC）の実践的概念、それに伴う緊張関係、および実装課題を特定する探索的研究。公的部門での環境管理メカニズムの複雑性を描出している。
papers.novelty_reason: 環境管理制御は既知の領域だが、公共組織特有の文脈における実装の緊張関係の詳細な分析は相対的に新しい焦点である。

papers.title: The Role of Social Media Influencers in Promoting Therapeutic Compliance: Implications for Public Health Policy
papers.title_ja: 治療コンプライアンス促進におけるソーシャルメディアインフルエンサーの役割：公衆衛生政策への含意
papers.authors: Léna Griset, Loick Menvielle, Rupanwita Dash
papers.summary: Treatment adherence (hereafter, adherence) is critical to achieving positive therapeutic outcomes, whereas non-adherence remains a major public health challenge that hinders recovery and increases healthcare expenditures. As social media has become a prominent channel for information consumption and sharing, social media influencers (SMIs) may play an important role in enhancing adherence. Yet the mechanisms through which engagement with SMIs promotes adherence are not well understood. Drawing on the source attractiveness model, this study posits that influencer characteristics – specifically social attractiveness and perceived credibility – shape evaluations of health messages and, in turn, persuade followers toward adherence. We examine the relationship between SMI social attractiveness and adherence, test the mediating roles of perceived authenticity and perceived expertise, and explore the moderating role of SMI message type. Using survey data from 475 participants, we find that SM...
papers.summary_ja: ソーシャルメディアインフルエンサーが治療アドヒアランス（継続的治療実施）を促進する可能性を検証した研究。公衆衛生課題解決のためのデジタル影響力の活用メカニズムを分析している。
papers.novelty_reason: インフルエンサーマーケティングと医療コンプライアンスは個別に研究されているが、その直接的な組み合わせは公衆衛生領域での新しい応用である。

papers.title: The Role of Collective Bricolage in Creating University Governance Structures: The Example of the Galileo Observatory
papers.title_ja: 大学ガバナンス構造の創造における集合的ブリコラージュの役割：ガリレオ天文台の事例
papers.summary: This study investigates the concept of “collective bricolage” within the framework of creating a universe science observatory in France. In the face of significant transformations in higher education and research, this article examines how university stakeholders can employ collective bricolage to adapt to institutional mandates for restructuring. Drawing on Lévi-Strauss’s notion of bricolage and the theoretical contributions of Duymedjian and Rüling (2010), this research investigates how this bricolage can be implemented in the absence of conventional or normative space to support the process, and particularly within a context characterized by conflictual relationships. The case study analyzes the collective bricolage process and its components, demonstrating that the dialectical nature of collective bricolage facilitates the creation of robust governance structures through the negotiation and recombination of resources and rationales from the diverse actors involved.
papers.summary_ja: フランスの科学観測施設の設立プロセスを通じて、多様なステークホルダーが限定された資源で制度を創造する「集合的ブリコラージュ」メカニズムを検証した研究。高等教育の変動期における柔軟な制度形成過程を描出している。
papers.novelty_reason: ブリコラージュ理論は存在するが、大学ガバナンス創造への具体的応用と集合的次元の強調は新しい理論的展開である。

papers.title: Towards a transformative and territorial leadership: The case of organic farming development in Occitanie
papers.title_ja: 変革的で領土的なリーダーシップへ：フランス・オクシタニー地域における有機農業発展の事例
papers.authors: Pierre Triboulet, Charlène Arnaud, Liz Carey-Libbrecht
papers.summary: The aim of this article is to characterize the modalities of transformative leadership in support of local public action. It posits that this transformation is based on both the democratic and the distributed dimensions of leadership, and that it is concretely manifested in the territory concerned. To operationalize the concept of Territorial Transformative Leadership (TTL), it draws on a case study of a French Region, Occitanie, which is leading the political project to transform production methods from conventional to organic farming (OF). Twenty semi-structured interviews were conducted in Occitanie. Our results show the analytical potential of the concept of TTL, which reveals (dis)equilibria between the two dimensions of TTL, and questions both the ecosystem of actors driving public action, and the interdependencies between ecosystem and territory.
papers.summary_ja: 地域公共政策における変革的リーダーシップの様態を、民主的かつ分散型の次元から特性化した研究。オクシタニー地域の有機農業発展事例を通じて、領土的文脈でのリーダーシップ実践を検証している。
papers.novelty_reason: 変革的リーダーシップは既知だが、地域領土という空間的次元と有機農業という環境政策への適用は新しい文脈的拡張である。

papers.title: Management of healthcare risk waste and non-hazardous healthcare waste: the case of a public hospital in western France
papers.title_ja: 医療リスク廃棄物および非危険医療廃棄物の管理：フランス西部の公立病院の事例
papers.authors: Meriam Karaa, Hanane El Bahraoui, Sarah Garidi, Sébastien de Villèle
papers.summary: This article explores the management of hospital waste, specifically healthcare risk waste (HCRW) and non-hazardous healthcare waste (NHCW). Our study focuses on a hospital in western France, considered as a reference facility, and underlines the specific issues it faces. The methodological approach taken is based on a qualitative case study, providing a thorough understanding of waste management, risk analysis and traceability processes. Data were collected via interviews, direct observations and a test audit to assess regulatory compliance. The goal of this research is to analyse current practices and to provide recommendations for HCRW and NHCW management and traceability.
papers.summary_ja: フランス西部の公立病院における医療廃棄物（特に危険物と非危険物）管理の具体的実践と課題を、事例研究アプローチで検証した論文。医療機関での廃棄物管理システムの複雑性を描出している。
papers.novelty_reason: 医療廃棄物管理は確立された実務領域であり、本研究はその実践的な事例記録的性質が強く、理論的新規性に乏しい。

papers.title: A semi-autonomous public organization’s legitimation work: the case of the survival of an actor in the disability field
papers.title_ja: 準自律的公共組織の正当性構築業：障害分野における一組織の存続の事例
papers.authors: Alexandre Salvatori, Sarah Richard, François Grima
papers.summary: This qualitative study, based on semi-structured interviews and ethnography, starts from the observation that little research has been done on maintaining the legitimacy of semi-autonomous public organizations in a context constrained by certain principles of New Public Management. These principles question the legitimacy of public organizations as the most relevant actors for meeting user expectations. In this article, we study the case of GHP, a semi-autonomous public organization of the “agency” type based in France, which manages a public fund. Based on neo-institutional theory, the study seeks to understand the involvement of actors in the dynamics of maintaining the internal and external legitimacy that ensures the sustainability of an organization. We show that maintaining legitimacy and its alignment between internal and external sources is achieved in a process involving four stages: challenges, maintenance, diffusion, and consensus. Institutional entrepreneurs within the orga...
papers.summary_ja: 新公共管理（NPM）原則の制約下で、準自律的公共組織がいかに組織的正当性を維持するかについて、半構造化インタビューとエスノグラフィーで検証した質的研究。公的部門の正当性維持メカニズムの複雑性を明らかにしている。
papers.novelty_reason: 新公共管理下での正当性研究は存在するが、NPM制約の中での正当性維持戦略に焦点を当てた詳細な分析は相対的に新しい視点である。

papers.title: Managerial competence as a determinant of organizational performance
papers.title_ja: 経営者能力が組織パフォーマンスの決定要因となる
papers.summary: Despite the important contribution made by managers to modern economies, little research has been undertaken into the behaviour of managers that is related to organizational performance. Upper level managers (i.e., executives) have been studied least. Consequently, this thesis has created and tested hypotheses on the relationship between managerial behaviour (i.e., competence) and organizational effectiveness at executive level. In addition, the thesis has also created and tested hypotheses on the relationship between managerial competence and individual variables. Directed by Campbell et al's (1970) model of managerial effectiveness, a review was made of the literature on organizational performance, managerial behaviour, environmental and individual variables. Based on this review, a revised model of managerial effectiveness was created from which a model of executive effectiveness in dynamic environments was derived. Eighteen hypotheses were drawn from the latter model for testing in...
papers.summary_ja: 現代経済における管理者の重要性にもかかわらず、管理者行動と組織パフォーマンスの関係性はほとんど研究されていない。本研究は特に上級経営者（エグゼクティブ）に焦点を当て、管理能力がパフォーマンスに与える影響を理論化・実証した。
papers.novelty_reason: 経営者能力とパフォーマンスの関係は基本的テーマだが、上級管理者層の具体的行動メカニズムを系統的に検証する点で限定的な新規性を持つ。

papers.title: Reforming Jointly Owned Property in Line with Saudi Vision 2030: Socio- legal Lessons Learned from English Commonhold and South African Sectional Title
papers.title_ja: サウジビジョン2030に沿った共有財産改革：英国のコモンホールドと南アフリカの区分所有権から得られた社会法的教訓
papers.summary: This thesis critically examines how Saudi Arabia’s Jointly owned property law and practises can be reformed to support Saudi’s 2030 housing development plan, which aims to increase home ownership in the country. Due to space restrictions and overcrowding in densely populated areas, jointly owned property is key to realising this objective. However, this thesis outlines several challenges, including inadequate legal awareness about JOP, disputes and enforcement issues, currently impede this aim, leading to an increasing demand for reforms. To address these challenges and propose appropriate reforms, this thesis adopts a comparative socio-legal methodology that brings insights from comparative doctrinal analysis into conversation with those insights gained from interviews with owners/lawyers conducted in Saudi Arabia, South Africa, and England. Employing grounded theory for data analysis, themes emerged from the data, highlighting commonalities of best practices across the jurisdictions ...
papers.summary_ja: サウジアラビアの2030年住宅開発計画に対応させるため、共有財産法制の改革方法を、英国と南アフリカの比較法的事例から検証した論文。密集都市部での住宅所有権確保のための制度設計を分析している。
papers.novelty_reason: 比較法研究は既知分野だが、サウジアラビアのビジョン2030という特定の国家政策目標に対応させた共有財産制度の応用は新しい政策的文脈である。

papers.title: Self-censorship in Saudi cinema: aesthetics and representations
papers.title_ja: サウジアラビア映画における自己検閲：美学と表象
papers.summary: The thesis examines how self-censorship manifests in Saudi cinema and how it defines on-screen representations and aesthetics. Conventional studies on film censorship have typically adopted a binary framework, positioning filmmakers in opposition to institutional censorship. In contrast, this thesis reconfigures the discourse by treating filmmakers as active agents in the censorship process. Framed by the theoretical work of Michel Foucault and Christian Metz, the study moves beyond traditional definitions of censorship to explore how self-censorship operates at multiple levels: internalized, conforming, and resistant. Internalized self-censorship is an unconscious, ingrained power of discipline, manifesting as automatic practices shaped by the filmmaker’s internalization of societal expectations and a result of functioning within a panoptic environment. Conforming self-censorship is a conscious, deliberate response to societal pressures, where the fear of surveillance or public scruti...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文はサウジアラビア映画における自己検閲の現れ方と、それがスクリーン上の表象と美学をいかに規定するかを検証する。従来の映画検閲研究は二項対立的枠組みを採用してきたが、本研究は異なるアプローチを提示している。
papers.novelty_reason: 検閲と自己検閲の関係を美学的観点から再検討し、従来の二項対立構造を超える分析枠組みを提示している。

papers.title_ja: 物語空間における情動的な実演：現代イギリス都市フィクションとの読者の出会い

papers.title: Writing as Spiritual Practice: Beyond Dominant Narratives.
papers.title_ja: 精神的実践としての執筆：主流言説を超えて
papers.summary: This PhD in Creative and Critical Writing – Writing as Spiritual Practice: Beyond Dominant Narratives – explores addiction as a spiritual and developmental condition shaped by extractive corporate capitalism and considers how memoir can both reflect and resist dominant recovery narratives. Drawing on my lived experience of addiction and recovery, as well as my work as a peer support outreach worker, the project examines writing as a spiritual and political practice capable of unsettling ideological narratives that commodify suffering and reinforce neoliberal ideas of the self. The project comprises two interdependent components: a 40,000-word dissertation and a memoir, Practicing Dying. These are not separate entities, but two ways of making the same argument. Where Practicing Dying emerges from embodied experience, the critical component situates that experience within broader political, spiritual, and theoretical frames. Rather than seeking to prove the memoir’s insights in academic ...

papers.summary: This article asks how sharing everyday memories in Britain’s superdiverse urban spaces can foster understanding across difference. papers.summary: Fashion on the Frontier: Photography, Time and Colonial Modernity on the Madeira-Mamoré Railroad, Brazil (2026) examines the relationship between fashion, photography and the temporal regimes of colonial modernity in the Brazilian Amazon. It explores how land was demarcated with the expansion of the North American frontier in South America, but also how the contours of different ethnic and racialised bodies were delineated and articulated through fashion and via the pseudo-scientific medium of photography. By interrogating History as a critical practice in the fashioning of Latin America, her research questions the emphases and erasures that haunt Brazilian fashion histories.

Price, Zenobia Powell Perry, Margaret Bonds, and Betty Jackson King affirms a rich, Afrodiasporic concert tradition, in which African, Caribbean, and African American folk songs and dances are absorbed into a distinct classical voice.
